basis: All 12/12 gates PASS. Docker compose config valid. Backend and frontend Docker images build and verify correctly. No secrets leaked. All documentation complete.
limitations: E2E tests are NOT executed as part of the deployment pipeline (documented in RUNBOOK). Requires manual verification or separate CI job.
Baseline historico not verifiable in this phase (carried from Phase 7A).
WebForge CLI not available for load testing (carried from Phase 7A).

blockers_for_8B.description: Agregar notificaciones post-deployment (Slack/email) al workflow de GitHub Actions
Análisis de costos EC2 y estimación mensual de infraestructura
Configurar monitoreo básico (CloudWatch o similar) para los servicios Docker
Ejecutar E2E completo en entorno production-like antes de promoción a producción real
